transformations.name: CheAggregate
transformations.description: Aggregating based on pow, data, hour for distinct CHEs

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		mve_gkey as integer,
		Unit_Nbr as string,
		Facility_Id as string,
		Complex_Id as string,
		Yard_Id as string,
		Carrier_Visit_Key as integer,
		Event_Type_Id as string,
		Move_Kind as string,
		From_Location as string,
		To_Location as string,
		From_Position_Name as string,
		To_Position_Name as string,
		Carry_CHE_Operator_Id as short,
		Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Put_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Fetch_CHE_Id as long,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind as string,
		Carry_CHE_Id as long,
		Carry_CHE_Kind as string,
		Put_CHE_Id as long,
		Put_CHE_Kind as string,
		QC_CHE_Id as long,
		QC_CHE_Kind as string,
		t_carry_complete as timestamp,
		t_put as timestamp,
		t_fetch as timestamp,
		t_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_discharge as timestamp,
		t_carry_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_carry_fetch_ready as timestamp,
		t_carry_put_ready as timestamp,
		dist_carry as integer,
		dist_start as short,
		Twin_Fetch as string,
		Twin_Carry as string,
		Twin_Put as string,
		Category_Id as string,
		Freight_Kind_Id as string,
		to_pos_gkey as integer,
		fm_pos_gkey as integer,
		Restow_Reason as string,
		Container_Line_Id as string,
		Container_Line_Role as string,
		pow as string,
		ufv_gkey as integer,
		Berth_Id as string,
		Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg as double,
		active_ufv as integer,
		Requires_Power_Flag as string,
		OOG_Flag as string,
		Shipper_Id as string,
		Consignee_Id as string,
		Commodity_Id as string,
		ATA as timestamp,
		ATD as timestamp,
		Rehandles as string,
		Year as integer,
		Month as integer,
		Week as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mundra-ct03',
	folderPath: 'silver/moves') ~> source1
source1 filter(equals(Carry_CHE_Kind,'ITV')) ~> Filter1
Filter1 derive(CarryCompleteTime = toString(:CompletionTime,'HH:mm:ss'),
		CarryCompleteDate = toDate(toString(:CompletionTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd')),
		CarryCompleteHour = toInteger(split(toString(:CompletionTime,'HH:mm:ss'),":")[1]),
		WorkingShift = iif(toInteger(split(toString(:CompletionTime,'HH:mm:ss'),":")[1]) >= 8 && toInteger(split(toString(:CompletionTime,'HH:mm:ss'),":")[1]) < 20, 'Shift 1', 'Shift 2'),
		ShiftDate = iif(toInteger(split(toString(:CompletionTime,'HH:mm:ss'),":")[1]) < 8, 
    addDays(toDate(toString(:CompletionTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd')), -1), 
    toDate(toString(:CompletionTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd'))),
		CompletionTime = :CompletionTime,
		CompletionTime := iif(isNull(t_carry_complete),t_put, t_carry_complete)) ~> DerivedColumn2
derivedColumn5 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
DerivedColumn2 sort(asc(Carry_CHE_Id, true),
	asc(CompletionTime, true)) ~> sort1
sort1 select(mapColumn(
		Carry_CHE_Id,
		CarryCompleteDate,
		ShiftDate,
		CarryCompleteHour,
		WorkingShift,
		pow,
		Move_Kind,
		Unit_Nbr,
		mve_gkey,
		dist_carry,
		dist_start
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select1
select1 aggregate(groupBy(Carry_CHE_Id,
		ShiftDate,
		WorkingShift,
		CarryCompleteHour,
		pow,
		Move_Kind),
	dummy = count(1),
		count_of_moves = countDistinct(mve_gkey),
		count_of_trips = countDistinct(Unit_Nbr),
		dist_carry_total = sum(dist_carry),
		dist_start_total = sum(dist_start)) ~> CheAggregate
CheAggregate select(mapColumn(
		Carry_CHE_Id,
		CarryCompleteDate = ShiftDate,
		CarryCompleteHour,
		WorkingShift,
		pow,
		Move_Kind,
		count_of_moves,
		count_of_trips,
		dist_carry_total,
		dist_start_total
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select2
select2 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> alterRow2
sort1 window(over(Carry_CHE_Id,
		ShiftDate,
		WorkingShift),
	asc(CompletionTime, true),
	asc(mve_gkey, true),
	NextMoveTime = lead(CompletionTime,1),
		SecondNextMoveTime = lead(CompletionTime,2)) ~> window1
window1 derive(IdlePeriod_3Hrs = iif(
    toLong(NextMoveTime - CompletionTime) == 0, 
    toLong(SecondNextMoveTime - CompletionTime), 
    toLong(NextMoveTime - CompletionTime)
)) ~> derivedColumn1
derivedColumn1 aggregate(groupBy(Carry_CHE_Id,
		ShiftDate,
		WorkingShift),
	First_Lift_Raw = min(CompletionTime),
		Last_Lift_Raw = max(CompletionTime),
		Move_Count = countDistinct(mve_gkey),
		Move_Count_AdjustedforTwinLift = sum(iif(in(['TRUE', 'YES'], upper(Twin_Carry)), 0.5, 1.0)),
		TotalIdleTime = sumIf(IdlePeriod_3Hrs > 10800000, IdlePeriod_3Hrs)) ~> aggregate3
aggregate3 derive(ShiftStartTime = toTimestamp(
		toString(ShiftDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ' + 
		iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '08:00:00', '20:00:00'),
		'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
	),
		ShiftEndTime = toTimestamp( toString( iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', ShiftDate, addDays(ShiftDate, 1)),'yyyy-MM-dd' ) + ' ' +  	iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '19:59:59', '07:59:59'), 
		'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' 	),
		First_Lift = iif(
		toLong(First_Lift_Raw - toTimestamp(
			toString(ShiftDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '08:00:00', '20:00:00'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		)) > 10800000,
		First_Lift_Raw,
		toTimestamp(
			toString(ShiftDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '08:00:00', '20:00:00'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		)
	),
		Last_Lift = iif(
		toLong(
			toTimestamp(
				toString(
					iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', ShiftDate, addDays(ShiftDate, 1)),
					'yyyy-MM-dd'
				) + ' ' + 
				iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '19:59:59', '07:59:59'),
				'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
			) - Last_Lift_Raw
		) > 10800000,
		Last_Lift_Raw,
		toTimestamp(
			toString(
				iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', ShiftDate, addDays(ShiftDate, 1)),
				'yyyy-MM-dd'
			) + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '19:59:59', '07:59:59'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		)
	),
		Time_From_ShiftStart = iif(
		toLong(First_Lift_Raw - toTimestamp(
			toString(ShiftDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '08:00:00', '20:00:00'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		)) < 0,
		toLong(0),
		toLong(First_Lift_Raw - toTimestamp(
			toString(ShiftDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '08:00:00', '20:00:00'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		))
	),
		Time_To_ShiftEnd =  iif(
		toLong(toTimestamp(
			toString(
				iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', ShiftDate, addDays(ShiftDate, 1)),
				'yyyy-MM-dd'
			) + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '19:59:59', '07:59:59'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		) - Last_Lift_Raw) < 0,
		toLong(0),
		toLong(toTimestamp(
			toString(
				iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', ShiftDate, addDays(ShiftDate, 1)),
				'yyyy-MM-dd'
			) + ' ' + 
			iif(WorkingShift == 'Shift 1', '19:59:59', '07:59:59'),
			'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
		) - Last_Lift_Raw)
	)) ~> derivedColumn3
derivedColumn4 derive(WorkTime = iif(
		First_Lift_Raw == Last_Lift_Raw,
		Single_Move_WorkTime,
		iif(
			(toLong(Last_Lift - First_Lift) - iifNull(TotalIdleTime, toLong(0))) < 0,
			toLong(0),  
			toLong(Last_Lift - First_Lift) - iifNull(TotalIdleTime, toLong(0))
		)
        ),
		Raw_WorkTime = toLong(Last_Lift - First_Lift) - iifNull(TotalIdleTime, toLong(0)),
		Year = iifNull(year(ShiftDate),0),
		Month = iifNull(month(ShiftDate),0),
		Is_Negative = (toLong(Last_Lift - First_Lift) - iifNull(TotalIdleTime, toLong(0))) < 0,
		Is_Single_Move = First_Lift_Raw == Last_Lift_Raw) ~> derivedColumn5
derivedColumn3 derive(Single_Move_WorkTime = iif(
		First_Lift_Raw == Last_Lift_Raw,
		iif(
			Time_From_ShiftStart == 0 && Time_To_ShiftEnd == 0,
			toLong(3600000),  
			iif(
				Time_From_ShiftStart < Time_To_ShiftEnd && Time_From_ShiftStart > 0,
				Time_From_ShiftStart,
				iif(
					Time_To_ShiftEnd > 0,
					Time_To_ShiftEnd,
					toLong(3600000) 
				)
			)
		),
		toLong(0)
	)) ~> derivedColumn4
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mundra-ct03',
	folderPath: 'gold/tt_productivity',
	mergeSchema: false,
	autoCompact: false,
	optimizedWrite: false,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['Carry_CHE_Id','CarryCompleteDate'],
	umask: 0777,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('key',
		0,
		Year,
		Month
	)) ~> sink1
alterRow2 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		Carry_CHE_Id as long,
		CarryCompleteDate as date,
		CarryCompleteHour as integer,
		pow as string
	),
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'mundra-ct03',
	folderPath: 'gold/tt_utilisation',
	mergeSchema: false,
	autoCompact: false,
	optimizedWrite: false,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['Carry_CHE_Id','CarryCompleteDate','pow'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> sink2
